## GetUserAvatar

| Parameter | In | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|---|
| `user_id` | path | `string` | yes |

**Returns:** a binary stream (`io.Reader`)

**Example**

```go
result, err := client.Avatars.GetUserAvatar(context.Background(), "USER_ID")
if err != nil {

}
fmt.Println(result)
```
